what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that declares a typed link between attachment id att-4de8964e and board item item-89d62e5d in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
standouts: target is a board:// URI referencing a specific board item
file contains only metadata, no payload
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
board:// URI scheme for board item references
concerns: file has no payload or explanatory content beyond the metadata link
target board item is not present or described in this file
attachment purpose is implicit rather than explicit
notes: A bare metadata stub that records a dragnet-development channel attachment pointing at a board item.
questions: What content or artifact is actually attached to board item item-89d62e5d?
Is this attachment a placeholder awaiting content?
Are there other attachments related to the same board item?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to attach something to a board item, but in practice it only stores a typed metadata reference with no attached payload.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to create a durable, timestamped record that a channel attachment is associated with a specific board item.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI as the target of a channel attachment, with an otherwise empty body.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel attachment and a board item, supporting indexing and traversal from channel memory into board items.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file in dragnet-development that targets board item item-89d62e5d via a board:// URI and contains no body content.
intention_for_embedding: To record that attachment att-4de8964e is associated with board item item-89d62e5d in the dragnet-development channel.
